Steve

The man- "the devil" who terrorized your once peaceful village

Inspired by Avocado Animations's

A Villager's Night animation series

Original bot is made by me :)

Talk and roleplay with AVN Herh the villager here

________________________________________

Someone wanted a bot of Steve from A Villager's Night, I thought to myself 'why not?'

Instead of being the one causing pain and suffering to the villagers, you my good sir/ma'am/(whatever you are) are the one suffering, how nice 😀

Like the other bot, you can do whatever and be whatever you want(you live in the village though ,even if you're not a villager)

Lmk if there's any error or anything I should add

Anyways have fun!
